message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #000000
skinparam classArrowColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #C8E6C9
skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #000000
skinparam interfaceBackgroundColor #E1BEE7
skinparam interfaceBorderColor #000000
skinparam interfaceFontStyle italic

class User {
    -id: integer
    -name: string
    +getId(): integer
    +getName(): string
}

class Employee {
    -position: string
    +getPosition(): string
}

class Owner {
    -balance: integer
    +getBalance(): integer
}

class CakeStore {
    -storeName: string
    -owner: Owner
    -employees: []Employee
}

class CoffeeStore {
    -storeName: string
    -owner: Owner
    -employees: []Employee
}

class MainStore {
    +storeInterface: StoreInterface
}

interface StoreInterface {
    +getStoreName(): string
    +getOwnerName(): string
    +getEmployees(): []Employee
}

User <|-- Employee
User <|-- Owner
Employee --o CakeStore
Employee --o CoffeeStore
Owner *-- CakeStore
Owner *-- CoffeeStore
CakeStore ..|> StoreInterface
CoffeeStore ..|> StoreInterface
MainStore --> StoreInterface

@enduml
